site.title: Abdulrahman Abdulrahim — Portfolio
site.description: Software Engineer with 3+ years of experience. Frontend & AI focused.

home.heroDescription: Software Engineer with 3+ years of experience building responsive web and mobile applications, fine-tuning ML models, and integrating AI into production. I build scalable interfaces with React and React Native and work with transformer models for NLP and computer vision.
home.bioText: I specialize in React and React Native development, building production applications across e-commerce, healthcare, and accessibility domains. I focus on intuitive user experiences and integrating modern APIs and AI-assisted features into production-ready applications.
home.blogPost1Desc: Thoughts on cross-platform mobile development with Expo.
home.blogPost2Desc: Designing voice-first interfaces for visually impaired users.
home.project1Desc: A modern React-based e-commerce platform with Redux, Firebase auth, and real-time inventory.
home.project2Desc: Cross-platform healthcare app connecting patients with professionals for consultations.
home.currentlyBuildingDesc: A voice-first navigation app for visually impaired users with React Native & AI.
home.currentlyLearningDesc: Advanced computer vision pipelines with PyTorch and real-time inference optimization.

blog.title: Blog
blog.description: Notes on frontend engineering, mobile development, and accessibility.

about.title: System Bio
about.bioText: Software Engineer — Frontend & AI focused. 3+ years of experience building responsive web and mobile applications using React and React Native, and fine-tuning transformer models for NLP and computer vision. Currently leading frontend development at DSHub.
about.compFrontendDesc: Building production applications with React, React Native, Expo, and Tailwind CSS. Focused on component-driven architecture and cross-platform consistency.
about.compAiDesc: Fine-tuning transformer models (Whisper, DistilBERT) and building computer vision pipelines with PyTorch and YOLOv5.
about.compDesignDesc: Creating visual brand identities and UI component systems with Figma and Adobe Creative Suite.
about.compArchDesc: Designing component architectures, API integrations, and optimizing frontend performance for production-scale applications.
about.role1Subtitle: Frontend Engineer & Product Designer // Nov 2024 - Present
about.role1Acc1: Leading frontend architecture using React and Next.js, ensuring high-performance and scalable web applications.
about.role1Acc2: Developing visual brand identities and UI components to bridge complex backend systems and end-users.
about.role1Acc3: Mentored interns across UI/UX design and frontend development tracks, fostering design-to-code consistency.
about.role2Title: Dept. of Computer Engineering, ABU Zaria
about.role2Acc1: Worked on developing and training machine learning models for departmental research projects.
about.role2Acc2: Managed and configured networking devices and computing systems within faculty laboratories.
about.role2Acc3: Supported tutoring for junior students on core engineering principles and software deployment.
about.educationDesc: Bachelor of Engineering in Computer Engineering with focus on software systems and AI applications.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.description: I'm always open to collaborating on interesting projects, discussing ideas, or just chatting about tech. Feel free to reach out!
contact.protocol: Send a message and I'll get back to you
